name: Chocolate Tea Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare an 8x4 inch loaf pan by greasing it with butter.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Beat in the egg.
5. Add the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt, mixing well after each addition.
6. Stir in the buttermilk, nuts, and raisins (if using).
7. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
8. Bake for 55-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the bread to cool before serving.
